p1.physical_facts: Yellow pot; dense foliage; turgid leaves.
p1.audit_note: Consistent growth pattern maintained throughout the 5-day sequence.

p2.physical_facts: Black pot; central growth; visible leaf margin dehydration.
p2.audit_note: Persistent drooping despite moisture sensor readings; root-zone compaction suspected.

p3.physical_facts: Black pot; 2 leaves; white rabbit anchor present.
p3.audit_note: Minor tip necrosis observed; stable posture relative to rabbit anchor.

p4.physical_facts: Black pot; small sprout near rim.
p4.audit_note: Slow but steady vertical development of the primary leaf.

biome_observations.soil_surface: Consistent presence of white perlite/mineral additives; no new fungal growth.

temporal_deltas.t4_to_t3: Minor shift in p4 leaf angle.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: p4 leaf displays slight turgor recovery.

visual_health_inference.p2: High stress; visual evidence of dehydration despite sensor data suggests sensor failure.
visual_health_inference.p3: Mild stress; VPD-related tip necrosis remains static.

anomalies: A5 sensor data divergence in p2 remains the primary anomaly.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is currently in a state of managed equilibrium. p1 and p3 remain stable. p2 continues to exhibit signs of physiological stress (drooping/dehydration) that contradict the A5 sensor readings, confirming a hardware failure. p4 shows slow, healthy development. No new incidental growth or external contamination observed.
